svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="1rRhs7id_PtyvMBuucM2"> <mxGraphModel dx="2019" dy="1683" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml

' Professional visual style
skinparam defaultFontName Helvetica
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam roundcorner 0

skinparam state {
 BackgroundColor LightBlue
 BorderColor Black
 ArrowColor Black
 AttributeFontSize 11
}

mainframe sm [State Machine Diagram] Communication Failure and Fallback

[*] --> Normal_Platoon_Operation

state \"Normal Platoon Operation\" as Normal_Platoon_Operation
Normal_Platoon_Operation : entry / Initialize platoon coordination
Normal_Platoon_Operation : do / Receive HEARTBEAT every 100 ms
Normal_Platoon_Operation : do / Maintain V2V synchronization
Normal_Platoon_Operation : do / Reset heartbeat watchdog timer
Normal_Platoon_Operation : exit / Heartbeat timeout detected
Normal_Platoon_Operation : \n\n

Normal_Platoon_Operation --> Normal_Platoon_Operation : HEARTBEAT received / reset timer
Normal_Platoon_Operation --> Communication_Lost : Watchdog timeout [no heartbeat for 300 ms]

state \"Communication Lost\" as Communication_Lost
Communication_Lost : entry / V2V communication loss detected
Communication_Lost : entry / Trigger LINK_LOST event
Communication_Lost : do / Broadcast communication-failure notification
Communication_Lost : exit / Start fallback timer
Communication_Lost : \n\n\n

Communication_Lost --> Safe_Mode_Activated : Fallback required [link loss confirmed]

state \"Safe Mode Activated\" as Safe_Mode_Activated
Safe_Mode_Activated : entry / SAFE_FALLBACK activated within 200 ms
Safe_Mode_Activated : do / Switch to sensor-based autonomous control
Safe_Mode_Activated : do / Adaptive Cruise Control active
Safe_Mode_Activated : do / Lane Keeping Assist active
Safe_Mode_Activated : do / Monitor inter-vehicle distance
Safe_Mode_Activated : do / Increase gap if spacing is unsafe
Safe_Mode_Activated : exit / Safe spacing restored or emergency risk detected
Safe_Mode_Activated : \n\n\n

Safe_Mode_Activated --> Emergency_Braking : Safety monitor [gap < minimum safe distance]
Safe_Mode_Activated --> Distance_Reestablished : Sensor update [gap >= minimum safe distance]

state \"Emergency Braking\" as Emergency_Braking
Emergency_Braking : entry / Activate emergency braking
Emergency_Braking : do / Reduce collision risk
Emergency_Braking : do / Increase inter-vehicle gap
Emergency_Braking : exit / Gap returned to safe range
Emergency_Braking : \n\n

Emergency_Braking --> Safe_Mode_Activated : Gap update [gap >= minimum safe distance]

state \"Distance Reestablished\" as Distance_Reestablished
Distance_Reestablished : entry / Safe gap confirmed
Distance_Reestablished : do / Maintain independent speed control
Distance_Reestablished : do / Continue fallback operation
Distance_Reestablished : exit / Recovery possible only if communication returns
Distance_Reestablished : \n\n\n

Distance_Reestablished --> Communication_Restored : HEARTBEAT received [connection restored]
Distance_Reestablished --> Distance_Reestablished : No heartbeat / remain in safe fallback

state \"Communication Restored\" as Communication_Restored
Communication_Restored : entry / Communication restored
Communication_Restored : do / Synchronize status with platoon
Communication_Restored : do / Reconfigure platoon coordination
Communication_Restored : exit / Re-integration completed
Communication_Restored : \n\n

Communication_Restored --> Normal_Platoon_Operation : Reconfiguration complete [safe to resume platooning]

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="akIe3k5FB00MoSY9BA9a-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1038" width="1076" x="-30" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 1076px; height: 1038px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;

g.text: sm [State Machine Diagram] Communication Failure and Fallback
do / Switch to sensor-based autonomous control
do / Increase gap if spacing is unsafe
exit / Safe spacing restored or emergency risk detected
exit / Gap returned to safe range
exit / Recovery possible only if communication returns
No heartbeat / remain in safe fallback
